name: CytoDyn Inc.
business: CytoDyn Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the clinical development of leronlimab, a humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5, for multiple therapeutic indications including solid-tumor oncology. The company has no approved products and generates no revenue from product sales. Its primary business is advancing leronlimab through clinical trials for potential regulatory approval.

exposures.sentence: The Company is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the clinical development of innovative treatments for multiple therapeutic indications based on its product candidate, leronlimab (also referred to as PRO 140), a novel humanized monoclonal antibody targeting the C-C chemokine receptor type 5 (CCR5).

The Company has an active and ongoing joint development agreement with a third-party company with generative AI drug discovery and development tools in an effort to develop one or more longer-acting molecules.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in Phase II colorectal cancer trial
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, the first patient was dosed in the Company’s Phase II trial evaluating the efficacy of leronlimab in patients with relapsed/refractory MSS mCRC

catalysts.event: Scheduled sentencing of former CEO and former CRO CEO
catalysts.sentence: Mr. Pourhassan and Mr. Kazempour are currently scheduled to be sentenced in September 2025.
